app.title: Canchitapp
app.description: Manage your futsal games, teams, and reservations with ease.

home.title: Book your futsal field in seconds
home.subtitle: Browse venues, check real-time availability and reserve a field for your next match.

howItWorks.step1Description: Explore futsal venues near you and check real-time availability.
howItWorks.step2Description: Choose the field, date, and time that works for your match.
howItWorks.step3Description: Reserve instantly and get ready to play.

login.description: Sign in with your Google account to book fields and manage reservations.
login.error: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

venues.title: Venues
venues.emptyDescription: Check back soon — new venues are added regularly.

venueDetail.notFound: This venue doesn't exist or was removed.
venueDetail.emptyFieldsDescription: This venue hasn't added any fields to book.

book.title: Book a field
book.loadFieldsError: Failed to load fields for this venue.
book.loadAvailabilityError: Failed to load availability for this date.
book.utcNotice: Time slots are shown in UTC.
book.slotTakenError: This slot was just booked by someone else. Please pick another time.
book.genericConfirmError: Something went wrong while confirming your booking. Please try again.

myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.cancelDialogDescription: This will free up the slot for others to book. This action cannot be undone.

adminVenues.title: My Venues
adminVenues.createError: Failed to create venue. Please check the fields and try again.
adminVenues.emptyDescription: Create your first venue to start managing fields and bookings.

adminConfig.saveVenueError: Failed to save venue changes. Please try again.
adminConfig.saveFieldError: Failed to save field. Please try again.
adminConfig.emptyFieldsDescription: Add a field to start accepting bookings.
adminConfig.deleteFieldBlockedError: This field has active reservations. Cancel them first before deleting.
adminConfig.deleteFieldGenericError: Failed to delete field. Please try again.
adminConfig.depositRequired: Require a deposit at booking time
adminConfig.depositRequiredDescription: Players must pay a deposit via Mercado Pago to confirm a booking. The slot is held for 15 minutes while payment is in progress.

adminBookings.title: Venue Bookings
adminBookings.cancelDialogDescription: This will free up the slot. This action cannot be undone.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to view this page. If you think this is a mistake, contact the venue owner.

notFoundPage.title: Not found
notFoundPage.defaultMessage: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

bookReturn.title: Payment status
bookReturn.pendingDescription: We are still waiting for confirmation from Mercado Pago. This page will update automatically.
bookReturn.rejectedDescription: Your payment was not approved and the reservation was cancelled. Please try booking again.
bookReturn.timeoutDescription: We could not confirm your payment status yet. Check your bookings later or contact support.
